---
title: "Linear and Quadratic Inequalities"
subtitle: "Year 12 - Course 1 - Module 2"
author: "Clare Gibson"
date: "2024-06-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Packages
library(ggplot2)
```

# Linear and Quadratic Inequalities
Testing out ggplot2:

```{r ggplot2-test}
# define equation
e <- function(x){2*x^2+5}

# plot equation
ggplot(
  data.frame(x=c(-50,50)),
  aes(x=x)
) +
  stat_function(fun = e)
```
